## Focus

Content Library System Implementation - Phase 1 Complete ✅

## Objective

Transform essential-links.json into unified links+snippets system with multi-dimensional tagging, CLI tool, programmatic API, and workflow integration

## Progress

**Phase 1 (Create System): Complete ✅**
- Built content-library.json with 26 migrated items
- Built content_library.py CLI tool (search/add/update/deprecate/list/export)
- Tested all CLI operations successfully
- Added command registration to N5
- Deprecated old essential-links.json
- Created comprehensive documentation

**Phase 2 (Parallel Operation): Ready to begin**
- Both systems active
- New items go to content-library only

## Next Actions

1. Add bio and company description snippets (see SNIPPET_EXAMPLES.md)
2. Test search functionality with new snippets
3. Update follow-up-email-generator workflow
4. Update meeting-intelligence-orchestrator workflow
5. Archive essential-links.json after workflow migration
